title: Panniantong/Agent-Reach
summary: A zero-cost CLI tool that gives AI agents the capability to browse the entire internet, enabling search across Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, and XiaoHongShu without any API fees. Uses web scraping techniques instead of paid APIs. Python-based, 26.8k stars, gained 5,364 stars this week.
chinese_summary: 一款零成本的 CLI 工具，让 AI Agent 能够浏览整个互联网，无需 API 费用即可搜索 Twitter、Reddit、YouTube、GitHub、Bilibili 和小红书。基于 Python 实现，使用网页抓取技术替代付费 API，2.68 万星，本周新增 5364 星。
